data.title: Asia Pacific Mining Industry review 2025: Detailed report on key trends, major mines, and projects. Leading region in mining.
data.description: The report "Asia Pacific Mining Review 2025" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's lineup. This comprehensive report offers insights into the Asia Pacific mining industry, encompassing crucial macroeconomic trends, commodity prices, and operational landscapes within primary and up-and-coming mining markets. It furnishes in-depth data on production across countries, significant operational mines, as well as notable exploration and development ventures. Within Asia Pacific, a prominent global mining hub, this report serves as a valuable resource for industry stakeholders, offering a detailed overview of the dynamics shaping the region's mining sector.

data.title: HTX launches 200,000 USDT airdrop giveaway in partnership with TRON Ecosystem at Year-End Carnival.
data.description: Panama City experiences a surge in year-end market activities with the launch of the highly anticipated HTX Year-End Carnival by HTX. Scheduled from December 22, 2025, to January 18, 2026, the event promises a generous amount of 200,000 USDT.

data.title: CGTN reports on rise of Dongbei as top winter destination, overcoming barriers. Story on China's coldest city - a new hotspot.
data.description: On December 25, 2025, CGTN aired a program titled "China's Coldest City, Hottest Party" highlighting Dongbei, known as China's Northeast, as a popular winter destination. The show explores how the region overcomes challenges like snow and ice to become a sought-after location.

data.title: Gifting $100 in Bitcoin, Dogecoin, and Ethereum last Christmas would now be worth more, potentially sparking gift-giving ideas.
data.description: The act of giving cryptocurrency to family members has become more popular due to the increased accessibility of major cryptos such as Bitcoin (BTC), Dogecoin (DOGE), and Ethereum (ETH). Looking back, if someone received cryptocurrency as a Christmas gift in 2024, the value of that gift today may surprise them. It seems that many gift recipients are now hoping to receive cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin as presents instead of traditional gifts like toys, clothes, gift cards, or money. This trend is on the rise, and recipients might have questions for the givers, potentially leading to some awkward holiday conversations similar to those on Thanksgiving Day.
